title: CPU Warning threshold_breach on sj-core-01
description: CPU utilization crossed 75% threshold on sj-core-01. Single alert, no correlated anomalies. Same alert fired 5 times in the last hour without escalation.

pre_triage.suppression_rationale: threshold_breach with no corroboration; single signal; 5 repeat fires in last hour with no escalation

_comment: This scenario should be SUPPRESSED by PRE_TRIAGE without spending any tokens. It demonstrates the 35-40% alert noise reduction: common CPU threshold alerts that fire repeatedly and never escalate are filtered before the FSM loop even starts.
